response.overview: In a park, a girl wants to break up with a boy, but things are not that easy... PARK Tetralogy:  Autumn is one movement of a four-film cycle. The films are four variations on a single theme. The director, YU Yunsheng, explores the same narrative nucleus through four different seasons and four distinct casts.  This is a cinematic experiment on memory, time, and the mutability of human emotions.  This is a four-film cycle. Total runtime 332 mins.  We recommend viewing sequentially or as individual features.
response.tagline: In a park, a girl wants to break up with a boy, but things are not that easy...
response.title: PARK tetralogy autumn
